title: The 1954 Atomic Energy Act and UFOs
summary: This interview excerpt discusses how the 1954 Atomic Energy Act was deliberately written to protect UFO secrets under nuclear secrecy provisions. The segment explores how UFO programs may be hidden within Department of Energy clearance systems rather than traditional intelligence community channels.

acronyms.definition: Modern term for UFOs used by government and military

events.description: The Atomic Energy Act was passed, with language that Grusch claims was deliberately written to protect UFO secrets under nuclear secrecy provisions

key_claims.claim: The 1954 Atomic Energy Act was deliberately written to protect UFO secrets under nuclear secrecy provisions
Materials with radiological energy (Alpha, Beta decay) are subject to the same secrecy as nuclear weapons under the Atomic Energy Act
The Manhattan Project and Department of Energy clearance system is most applicable to UFO custody and secrecy
People with Above Top Secret clearances in traditional channels have never heard of UFO programs because they exist under DOE clearance systems
